notes: Heuristic Valve/Steam region candidates for the Valve Region Latency Diagnostic. These are not Valve-official in-match ping endpoints; ICMP reachability varies over time.

targets.Label: Stockholm
targets.Provenance: Heuristic SDR candidate set adapted from cs2-omz and kept versioned inside this repo.
targets.Notes: Route-quality proxy only. ICMP may be blocked by some candidates.
